roa.docketEntryComment: COURT OF APPEAL Decision Remittitur - THE CONVICTIONS ON COUNTS 3 AND 4 (IDENTIFIED AS COUNTS 14 AND 15 IN THE ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT) ARE VACATED.  THE TRIAL COURT IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AN AMENDED ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT REFLECTING THE JUDGMENT AS MODIFIED IN THIS OPINION AND FORWARD A COPY TO THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION.  IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED.
